text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin and I are in the middle<n>of training
when she has a small<n>outburst.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Dammit! How am I already out of<n>breath?!
choice_data_list: Maybe you're still tired from your last race.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I'm totally fine, and I'm gonna run in<n>the next race
too, so—

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
choice_data_list: I really think you should rest...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I told you I'm fine! Let's get backto training.

All those back-to-back races have<n>clearly
exhausted her. I should rethink<n>her upcoming
schedule.
